title: rubus × immutabiliformis
intro: Rubus × immutabiliformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus akane). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which have been found to possess antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rubus × immutabiliformis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing potential protection against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
